creator: buchananc@gmail.com
text:
X is choppy on my machine.  I upgraded to the latest version of X (1.4.2) and the problem still exists.  Basically, X will pause until I click or move my mouse.  upon looking at my logs, there seems to be a problem with dri.  

I have included output from Xorg.log, dmesg, kldstat and pciconf

I have exhausted google searches to no avail.  Usually I like to solve my own problems, but this one I can't seem to do so.  Please excuse all of the log outputs.  I am trying to give you guys as much detail as possible.

Much thanks for your time.  I know you're busy, so I greatly appreciate any assistance you might be able to provide.
